llm_instruction: Use this file only after a candidate job was selected. Copy the BASF URL exactly from job.url; never construct job links.

job.title: Assistant Manager - Technical Development Flexible PU
job.description: Objectives of the Position: To support customers and Technical Sales (Services and development) on technical solutions through technical development and drive PMU Projects. Identifying customer needs and opportunities in the field of PU Systems through Technical Development. PU system development, optimization/fine-tuning, Handling customer complaints, trials at customer end and coordinating with Technical Service for developments and quality complaints, etc Main Tasks: Technical Development in South Asia (India) Identify and develop new applications for PM portfolio in Polyurethane systems in the field of Flexible Polyurethane foam (Automotive and Furniture Industry). To carry out in-house trials and approval for new systems, and to maintain comprehensive documentation of all developments and trials. To assist in setting and reviewing specifications for the quality control of all new/existing systems developed. Pursue customer-driven innovations / New applications and manage joint development projects with full accountability. Contribute to the development of the business strategy by ensuring appropriate information flow. Owns the Standard operating procedure, lab equipment maintenance, and EHS BASF guidelines at PU lab and Record Maintenance. Evaluation of low-cost alternative raw materials to optimize formulation cost. Facilitate Formulation transfer from regional to India system house Developing PU system development plan as per the market and implementing it. Closure of Timely NCM resolution, liquidation of non-moving /aged stock, and settlement of customer issues Collaborate with Internal /External stakeholders of business value chain partners for new business development Co-ordination with Regional Technical Development, local Technical Service/Technical Development team, sales team to translate success stories into business growth. Shared Accountabilities: With Industry Team, Technical sales and Service: Initiate product portfolio development of industry With Technical sales Industry marketing: Align with segment strategies and coordinate local Technical Service/Technical Development and application development activities in alignment with country and regional TD/TS leadership. Optimize the course of work quality through timely reprocessing and re-validation in coordination with technical sales, Supply Chain Management, Customer Service Officer, Quality Assurance, and production . Key Shared Accountabilities: Regional Industry Team: Contributes...
